docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
